Episodes.Title: Wildcat Is Down
Episodes.Writer: Dan Fogelman, Stephen Markley, Katie French
Episodes.Actors: Sterling K. Brown, Julianne Nicholson, Sarah Shahi
Episodes.Plot: It's just another day in Paradise until Xavier Collins discovers one of the world's most powerful individuals has been viciously murdered. Xavier analyzes the crime scene while recalling his complex relationship with the victim.
